metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by inkwonjung-colosseum: productivity, documentation, and developer tools.

plugins.name: confluence-export-kit
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for Confluence export-only workflows: auth setup, page, space, org, page-with-descendants export, and confluence-markdown-exporter bootstrap.

plugins.name: skeleton-plugin
plugins.description: Starter template for building plugins that support both Codex and Claude Code platforms.

plugins.name: planning-team-kit
plugins.description: Claude Code and Codex compatible planning document quality kit for structured brainstorming, artifact generation, review, and handoff drafts.

plugins.name: diagram-design
plugins.description: Editorial-quality technical and product diagrams rendered as standalone HTML with inline SVG and skinnable brand-aware styling.
